title: RecommendationControlChange
content:
# RecommendationControlChange


## Properties

- **control_change_id** (`string`): Unique identifier id for the Control Change request. This will only be returned when the Recommendation state is `accepted` or `auto_accepted` where the actions have been created and an id registered on the Server.
- **trace_id** (`string`): 
- **expiration_date** (`string`): UTC time when any the Control Change initiated will expire and the `status` automatically marked as `failed`, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **payload** (`any`): Value represented in one of these formats.
- **resource** (`string`): The asset / data stream pair that this Control Change will be applied to.
- **retries** (`integer`): Number of retry attempts to write the Control Change to the Bridge until a `processed` acknowledgment is received from the Bridge. If number of attempts exceeds `retries` then the Control Change Manager updates the Control Change key `state` with the value `failed`.
- **timeout** (`integer`): Time in seconds the Control Change Manager will wait after sending the Control Change for the Bridge to send a `processed` acknowledgement reply before retry sending the Control Change.
- **from** (`object`): Information about the current `resource` data when the the Control Change `payload` is created.
- **status** (`string`): 
- **status_message** (`string`): If something goes wrong while applying the action, this field will contain the error message.
summary: Object with properties: control_change_id, trace_id, expiration_date, payload, resource

control_change_id.description: Unique identifier id for the Control Change request. This will only be returned when the Recommendation state is `accepted` or `auto_accepted` where the actions have been created and an id registered on the Server.

expiration_date.description: UTC time when any the Control Change initiated will expire and the `status` automatically marked as `failed`, formatted in RFC 3339.

payload.description: Value represented in one of these formats.

resource.description: The asset / data stream pair that this Control Change will be applied to.

retries.description: Number of retry attempts to write the Control Change to the Bridge until a `processed` acknowledgment is received from the Bridge. If number of attempts exceeds `retries` then the Control Change Manager updates the Control Change key `state` with the value `failed`.

timeout.description: Time in seconds the Control Change Manager will wait after sending the Control Change for the Bridge to send a `processed` acknowledgement reply before retry sending the Control Change.

from.description: Information about the current `resource` data when the the Control Change `payload` is created.

value.description: Value represented in one of these formats.

timestamp.description: UTC time when the current `value` is recorded in the Control Change object, formatted in RFC 3339.

status_message.description: If something goes wrong while applying the action, this field will contain the error message.
